value_chain_position: Daily earth observation satellite constellation operator; sells geospatial imagery and analytics subscriptions to government intelligence, agriculture, forestry, and commercial customers via cloud APIs.
relative_comps: Planet Labs owns the largest operational earth-observation constellation by satellite count (~200 Doves + SkySats), giving it the highest-revisit-rate product in commercial EO. Revenue grew 34% YoY and FCF turned barely positive (14% margin), validating the space theme's profitability gate just barely. The closest public comp is Spire (SPIR) in small-sat data, though Planet's government NRO/DoD contracts anchor ~50% of revenue, bridging space and defense_tech. Maxar (acquired by Advent/MAXAR-private) is the main competitive threat for high-resolution optical. The s_curve is steep_ramp as government mandates for allied ISR expand Planet's TAM.
